comments.author: Michael Giver
comments.body:
Setup done: GitHub issue #740 filed ("Extract shared config-loading plumbing into a ConfigLoading module"), branch `giverm/OSCER-740-config-loading-extraction` cut off origin/main (0 commits ahead â€” clean base, NOT stacked on the C1 branch #738). Untracked `spec/support/yaml_config_helpers.rb` carried across the checkout and is present.

NEXT (tests-first, per FINAL plan): write `spec/services/config_loading_spec.rb` (exercise via `Module.new { extend ConfigLoading }`; matrix: missing/empty/comments-only/`{}` -> `{}`, valid hash passthrough, `!ruby/symbol` + malformed -> `/Invalid YAML/`, non-Hash top level -> `/Expected a Hash at top level/`), present for approval, then implement `app/services/config_loading.rb` + extend/alias both loaders + add `require_relative "support/yaml_config_helpers"` to rails_helper.rb.

Follow-up still open: retitle this ticket "base class" -> "shared module".

comments.author: Michael Giver
comments.body:
IMPLEMENTED on branch giverm/OSCER-740-config-loading-extraction (issue #740). Tests-first spec approved as-is, then implemented per FINAL plan:
- NEW app/services/config_loading.rb â€” shared module, public instance methods (NOT module_function), safe_load_optional + parse_yaml + ConfigurationError.
- exemption_types_loader.rb + feature_flags_loader.rb: require_relative "config_loading", extend ConfigLoading, ConfigurationError = ConfigLoading::ConfigurationError alias, deleted local plumbing. No raise sites edited (lexical-scope alias). Comment in feature_flags updated to note shared plumbing.
- NEW spec/services/config_loading_spec.rb (12 ex): public-visibility contract guard + full load matrix + parse_yaml block. Added a #parse_yaml block beyond plan matrix (public surface); user approved.
- write_yaml de-duped into spec/support/yaml_config_helpers.rb; removed local defs + redundant require "tempfile" from both loader specs; wired require_relative "support/yaml_config_helpers" into rails_helper.rb (support glob commented at :63). No initializer edits.

VERIFIED: targeted (config_loading + both loaders + features) 73 ex 0 failures; the 73 passing prove the module_function trap is avoided (initializers call Loader.safe_load_optional externally at boot). Full suite 2436 ex 0 failures, coverage 96.23 line / 82.92 branch. RuboCop clean (533 files, no offenses, no autofix). Change set = plan's Critical Files exactly, net -30 lines.

NOT committed/pushed. Follow-up still open: retitle this ticket "base class" -> "shared module".

comments.author: Michael Giver
comments.body:
/review (4-agent: security/Opus, quality/Sonnet, context/Haiku, freeform/Opus) â†’ PASS, min score 5/5. No must-fix/should-fix. Security: parse_yaml byte-identical, YAML.safe_load posture intact. Quality+Freeform independently ran specs green + verified extendâ†’public-singletonâ†’aliasâ†’lexical-scope chain at real boot, eager-load OK, 2 dev reload cycles OK. Context: all 5 ACs met, zero scope creep.

Applied the one convergent finding: added an explicit alias-identity assertion (`described_class::ConfigurationError` equal to `ConfigLoading::ConfigurationError`) to both loader specs â€” pins the load-bearing invariant that was previously only proven indirectly. Targeted specs now 63 ex 0 failures; RuboCop clean (533 files). Remaining nits deliberately left (require_relative matches certification.rb precedent; global write_yaml include matches env_helpers convention).

PR-body TODO (finding to disclose): the two loaders' ConfigurationError are now one shared object, so a rescue of one would catch the other's â€” no consumer affected today.

compiled_state.description:
Extract the byte-identical YAML load/parse/error plumbing shared by `ExemptionTypesLoader` and `FeatureFlagsLoader` into one shared `ConfigLoading` module. Behavior-preserving. Does NOT unify their merge/validation/transform, which diverge by design (`feature_flags_loader.rb` warns: "Do not 'align' the two by introducing deep_merge here").

Full plan (vault): `Tech Specs/OSCER/config-loading-extraction-plan.md`

## Origin
Surfaced reviewing Jeff Dettmann's Data Source Hierarchy spec (2026-07-01); the spec proposes three more loaders on this pattern. Jeff greenlit the extraction in Slack. Scope was narrowed from the original "base class" idea after a code read showed the two loaders share only ~15 identical lines (the plumbing) and deliberately diverge everywhere else.

## Scope (narrow, on purpose)
- `safe_load_optional(path)`, `parse_yaml(path)` (`YAML.safe_load` with `permitted_classes: [], permitted_symbols: [], aliases: false`; `nil` -> `{}`; non-Hash and `Psych` errors -> `ConfigurationError`), and `class ConfigurationError`.
- Both loaders `extend ConfigLoading` (public instance methods become public singleton methods, so `Loader.safe_load_optional(...)` still works) and alias `ConfigurationError = ConfigLoading::ConfigurationError`.
- Each loader keeps its own DEFAULTS, merge (deep_merge vs additive `build_registry`), validation, transform, and `module_function`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `app/services/config_loading.rb` defines `ConfigLoading` with `safe_load_optional`, `parse_yaml`, and `ConfigurationError` as public instance methods.
- [ ] `ExemptionTypesLoader` and `FeatureFlagsLoader` `extend ConfigLoading`, alias `ConfigurationError`, and no longer define the duplicated plumbing; their divergent logic is unchanged.
- [ ] No behavior change: existing loader specs pass unchanged; the two initializers are unedited and the app boots.
- [ ] New `spec/services/config_loading_spec.rb` covers the shared module (missing/empty/comments-only/`{}` file -> `{}`; valid hash; malformed YAML and disallowed `!ruby/symbol` -> `ConfigurationError` matching `/Invalid YAML/`; non-Hash top level -> `/Expected a Hash at top level/`).
- [ ] Duplicated `write_yaml` Tempfile spec helper consolidated into `spec/support/`.
- [ ] Coverage stays >= 92% line / 70% branch; RuboCop clean.

## Out of scope (follow-ups)
- A deep-merge base unifying merge/validation/transform: defer until a 2nd real deep-merge loader (exception-check) exists. Sketch + `:priority`-vs-`:ordering` notes are in the vault plan.
- `RoleMapper`'s duplicate `ConfigurationError`: different load contract (required file, env-scoped, `aliases: true`); leave as-is.

## References
- Plan: `Tech Specs/OSCER/config-loading-extraction-plan.md`
- Loaders: `app/services/exemption_types_loader.rb`, `app/services/feature_flags_loader.rb`
- Deployment-override docs: `CUSTOMIZATION.md`
